original: a suit of platemail made from chitin plates
context: <<POS:05818888>> e.description='a suit of platemail made from chitin plates'

original: Sharing the appearance of obsidian stone, these smooth plates fit over the body like some medieval armor, making you pass off as an awkward myrmedion knight. While it doesn’t have any of the flash and festivity of modern armor, the thick, natural plates could easily deflect and absorb your modern day hustle and bustle.
context: <<POS:05818944>> e.tooltip='Sharing the appearance of obsidian stone, these smooth plate'
